title: Expand PROP-046 scope: find the THIRD attention-inbox writer site that PROP-046 audit missed. Likely decider-patches-and-selfapply.md (Mech 1b 'analyst should verify my self-applied patch' write). Add same schema fix (target_mode + recommended_lane fields).
scope_authority: Either amend PROP-046 (PROP-046-amendment-002) with the additional writer site, OR file a separate PROP-048 covering the third writer. Tinker's call. Operator + cowork-claude apply.

bug_summary.observed_event: On 2026-05-19 05:13Z morning check, 2 attention-inbox items from 2026-05-18 were still pending 24h+ unread: ATT-2026-05-18T05:24Z (WIN-057 self-applied-patch verify) and ATT-2026-05-18T09:26Z (Part 6.13 MOND integration verify). Both lack target_mode / recommended_lane routing fields, so analyst Mode 2b dispatcher silently skips them. Same schema-omission bug class as PROP-046 covered.
bug_summary.in_session_fix: Commit 30476fd1 (2026-05-19T05:25Z): added target_mode + recommended_lane + schema_fix_at + schema_fix_by + schema_fix_note to both items in-place. Unsticks the 2 existing items but does NOT prevent recurrence.
bug_summary.third_writer_site_hypothesis: These items appear to be decider's 'I self-applied a patch, analyst please re-verify' writes. Likely source: monitor/prompts/reference/decider-patches-and-selfapply.md, possibly Mech 1b WRITE-VERIFY discipline section or the post-patch attention-inbox append after a same-run self-apply.
bug_summary.why_PROP_046_missed_it: PROP-046's audit task explicitly covered 'decider-stale-skip writer' (STALE-ASSESS items) and 'analyst-mode1-expansions.md PROP029-ORPHAN example.' The decider-patches-and-selfapply.md writer site is a THIRD location not enumerated in PROP-046's scope. Either (a) the audit task should have found it but missed, or (b) the writer site is structurally elsewhere — e.g., dynamic write embedded in a Mode logic block tinker's grep skipped.

operator_preferences_for_proposal: Minimal patch: same 2-line addition (target_mode + recommended_lane) at the third writer site.

Audit completeness: this is the SECOND time we've discovered a missed writer. Tinker should grep more aggressively — every appendAttentionInbox / fs.appendFileSync targeting attention-inbox.json / inbox.push() pattern in all monitor/prompts/ + monitor/prompts/reference/ + monitor/scripts/.
Choose: amendment-002 to PROP-046 OR new PROP-048. Tinker's judgment — explain the choice.

tasks_for_tinker.description: Grep monitor/prompts/ + monitor/prompts/reference/ + monitor/scripts/ + build-scripts/ for every site that writes to monitor/analyst/attention-inbox.json. Patterns to look for: appendAttentionInbox, fs.appendFileSync(...attention-inbox), inbox.push, JSON.parse(...attention-inbox.json), JSON.stringify(...attention-inbox), readFileSync(...attention-inbox). Likely candidates: decider-patches-and-selfapply.md (the prime suspect), decider-curmudgeon.md, analyst-mode34-procedures.md, possibly scripts that decider runs.

Decide: extend PROP-046 amendment-001 (already authored 2026-05-17) with the third site, OR file separate PROP-048. Amendment is simpler if scope is just one additional writer; new PROP is cleaner if the audit reveals MORE missed sites (e.g., 5+ writers total).
tasks_for_tinker.deliverable: phase_1_design.implementation_amendment with exact old_string/new_string for each writer site found.

tasks_for_tinker.description: Counter-arguments: (a) is the audit comprehensive THIS time, or might there be a fourth/fifth site? Specifically: are there any dynamic writes (e.g., template-string-generated inbox items in a node script) that pure-grep would miss? (b) Should the schema add be MORE than just target_mode — e.g., should we ALSO add a `writer_origin` field so future audits can verify each item knows its source?

in_scope_for_tinker: Comprehensive writer audit (this time aim for completeness)
Amendment OR new PROP — tinker's call
out_of_scope_for_tinker: Do NOT redesign the attention-inbox schema architecture — just add the routing fields where missing
related_props: PROP-046 (decider-stale-skip schema fix — same bug class, narrower scope)
PROP-046-amendment-001-implementation (the existing implementation patch, may need extending)
deadline_target: Next tinker scheduled run (daily 03:30Z 2026-05-20). Low priority — the 2 stale items are now schema-conformant via operator-direct fix; the structural fix prevents recurrence.
